info.title: Simplify
info.description:
Reduce background crowds and visual clutter with one click. Simplify helps your subject stand out—especially in busy city, travel, or event shots. 

What used to take careful masking now takes seconds. The result is a cleaner overall composition, without tedious retouching.

tools.prompt: Restore this image as if it were taken on a modern digital camera

info.title: Restore
info.description:
Repair and enhance aging photos by brightening faded color, sharpening softened detail, and reducing visible damage like scratches and dust. 

Perfect for family archives, scanned film, or historical work that deserves new clarity. What once required hours of manual repair now happens in seconds—reviving memories while respecting their story.

tools.prompt: Remove grain, maintain sharpness and natural color

info.title: Denoise
info.description:
Automatically remove unwanted grain, dust, scratches, and high-ISO artifacts while protecting your photograph’s authentic texture. 

Low-light shots and scanned film stay sharp and natural—without over-smoothing skin or detail.

info.title: Dehaze
info.description:
Restore contrast and color depth in flat, overcast, or misty outdoor images. 

Instead of stacking clarity and curve adjustments, Dehaze brings back depth in a single step resulting in photos that looks crisp, not over-processed.

tools.prompt: remove background and shadows and replace with a white glossy background (hex code #FFFFFF) and smooth texture

info.title: Isolate
info.description:
Create a clean, precise cutout and remove the background in one click. 

Ideal for product and commercial work—no pen tool, no edge cleanup. Just production-ready objects isolated on a white background.

tools.prompt: edit such that there is no wind

info.title: Hairstyle
info.description:
Remove stray hairs and errant flyaways without flattening natural texture. 

Portrait retouching that used to take hours of tedious, zoomed-in cloning now happens in seconds with results that look polished, not airbrushed.
